reviews.comment:
Excelente estación de servicios tiene todo baños impecables zona de descanso con mesas fogones piletas de lavado y la parrilla es muy recomendable por precios y calidad

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service station, it has everything: spotless bathrooms, a rest area with tables, fire pits, washing sinks, and the grill is highly recommended for its prices and quality.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6107809197063823438/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnM3UzMVNREAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atencion sobre todo los muchachos que sirven los pedidos. No te bacen esperar en el.mosyrador te alcanzan el.pedido a la mesa..... ahhh ojo aflojen el cocodrilo se acostumbra dejar propina

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, especially from the waiters. They don't make you wait at the counter; they bring your order right to your table. Oh, and remember, tipping is customary.
